name: Deviled Crab Ramekins
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the crab and remove any cartilage.
2. Chop the hard-cooked egg whites; mash the egg yolks. Combine the mashed yolks with margarine, 1/4 cup boiling water, salt, mustard, vinegar, and cayenne pepper. Mix well. Stir in the crab and chopped egg whites.
3. Beat the egg whites until soft peaks form; fold them into the crab mixture.
4. Place the mixture in greased shells or ramekins and cover with bread crumbs. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven until firm and the crumbs are brown.
